description: Full handoff document for the production refactor session. Portfolio build is complete and compiling cleanly. Next session goal: replace all mock data with real Supabase, add RLS, wire storage for photos, and prep for Vercel deploy.

coding_rules.philosophy: KISS — no unnecessary abstractions, build specifically for RestaurantOps
coding_rules.css_methodology: BEM — all custom classes follow Block__Element--Modifier naming
coding_rules.i18n: next-intl — all UI text must come from locales/en/common.json or locales/es/common.json

installed_packages.important_note: shadcn is installed with @base-ui/react (NOT @radix-ui). There is NO asChild prop on Button or DropdownMenuTrigger. Use className directly on the trigger elements.

theme.palette: Dark blue + silver — always dark, no light mode

routing.structure: Next.js App Router with [locale] dynamic segment

route_groups.(app): Admin/owner layout — AppShell with sidebar + topbar. Protected by RouteGuard allow='admin'
route_groups.(mobile): Member layout — MobileShell with bottom tabs. Protected by RouteGuard allow='member'

routes./[locale]/incidents: Incidents list with filter tabs (admin/owner only)
routes./[locale]/m/home: Mobile home — stats + recent activity (member only)
routes./[locale]/m/report: 3-step incident report form with photo upload (member only)

role_routing.mock_rule: Email containing 'staff' or 'member' gets member role. All others get owner role.

auth.refactor_target: Replace with Supabase Auth (email/password). Use Supabase SSR cookies via @supabase/ssr package.
refactor_notes: Install: @supabase/supabase-js @supabase/ssr
Create src/lib/supabase/client.ts (browser client)
Create src/lib/supabase/server.ts (server client using cookies())
Replace localStorage session with Supabase session cookies
AuthProvider should call supabase.auth.getSession() + onAuthStateChange()
signIn → supabase.auth.signInWithPassword()
signUp → supabase.auth.signUp() then insert into profiles table
signOut → supabase.auth.signOut()
getHomeRoute() logic stays the same — reads role from membership table

database.db_entry: src/db/index.ts (uses @neondatabase/serverless — swap URL for Supabase connection string)

profiles.rls_note: Users can only read/update their own profile

organizations.rls_note: Members can read their own org. Only owner can update.

memberships.rls_note: Users can read their own membership. Admins can read all in their org.

incidents.rls_note: Members can insert and read incidents in their org. Only admin/owner can update status.

security_events.rls_note: Insert only. Only admins can read.

database.refactor_target: Replace Neon driver with Supabase Postgres. Use DATABASE_URL from Supabase project settings → Connection → Transaction pooler URI.
refactor_notes: Update .env.local: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres.[ref]:[password]@aws-0-[region].pooler.supabase.com:6543/postgres?pgmode=transaction
Keep drizzle-orm. Remove @neondatabase/serverless, replace with postgres (node-postgres) driver
Run: npx drizzle-kit push to apply schema to Supabase
Enable RLS on all tables in Supabase dashboard
Write RLS policies (see rls_policies section below)
Replace mock context with server actions or API routes that use the Drizzle db client

rls_policies.note: These need to be created in Supabase SQL editor after schema push
organizations: SELECT: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM memberships WHERE user_id = auth.uid() AND org_id = organizations.id)
memberships: SELECT: user_id = auth.uid() OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM memberships m WHERE m.user_id = auth.uid() AND m.org_id = memberships.org_id AND m.role IN ('owner','admin'))
incidents: SELECT: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM memberships WHERE user_id = auth.uid() AND org_id = incidents.org_id)
INSERT: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM memberships WHERE user_id = auth.uid() AND org_id = incidents.org_id)
UPDATE: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM memberships WHERE user_id = auth.uid() AND org_id = incidents.org_id AND role IN ('owner','admin'))
security_events: INSERT: true (authenticated users can log events)
SELECT: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM memberships WHERE user_id = auth.uid() AND org_id = security_events.org_id AND role IN ('owner','admin'))

storage.current_state: MOCK — photo upload stores base64 data URL in memory (never persisted)
refactor_notes: Create bucket 'incident-photos' in Supabase dashboard (private bucket)
Upload path pattern: {org_id}/{incident_id}/{filename}
On submit in mobile report page: call supabase.storage.from('incident-photos').upload(path, file)
Get public URL: supabase.storage.from('incident-photos').getPublicUrl(path)
Store the returned URL as photo_url in the incident record
RLS on storage: users can upload to their own org folder, admins can read all

helpers.canEditIncident(role, userId, incident): owner/admin always, member only if reporter

permissions.note: These are client-side guards for UX only. Real enforcement is via RLS policies on the DB.

layout_admin.AppShell: src/components/layout/app-shell.tsx — flex wrapper with desktop sidebar + mobile Sheet drawer
layout_admin.Sidebar: src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx — brand logo, org name, nav links with active state
layout_admin.Topbar: src/components/layout/topbar.tsx — locale switcher + user avatar dropdown with sign out

layout_mobile.MobileShell: src/components/mobile/mobile-shell.tsx — header + scrollable content + fixed bottom tabs
layout_mobile.MobileHeader: src/components/mobile/mobile-header.tsx — org name + locale + avatar dropdown
layout_mobile.BottomTabs: src/components/mobile/bottom-tabs.tsx — Home / Report (FAB) / My Reports tabs

shared.RouteGuard: src/components/shared/route-guard.tsx — role-based protection, shows AdminSkeleton or MobileSkeleton while loading
shared.AdminSkeleton: src/components/shared/admin-skeleton.tsx — full shimmer layout for admin
shared.MobileSkeleton: src/components/shared/mobile-skeleton.tsx — full shimmer layout for mobile
shared.IncidentCard: src/components/shared/incident-card.tsx — card with severity/status badges + link to detail

variants.slideRightVariants: slide left/right for mobile step transitions (defined but inline in report page)

mock_layer.removal_plan: Delete src/lib/mock/data.ts. Replace auth context with Supabase auth. Replace incidents context with server actions (src/actions/incidents.ts). All pages that call useIncidents() will need to switch to fetching from the server action or a React Query hook.

production_values_needed: DATABASE_URL — from Supabase project: Settings → Database → Connection string (Transaction pooler)
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL — from Supabase project: Settings → API → Project URL
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY — from Supabase project: Settings → API → anon public key
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY — for server-side admin operations (keep secret, never NEXT_PUBLIC_)

refactor_checklist.order: Follow this order to avoid breaking the app at each step

steps.title: Create Supabase project
tasks: Create new project at supabase.com
Copy Project URL, anon key, service role key
Copy Transaction pooler connection string for DATABASE_URL
Update .env.local with real values

steps.title: Push database schema
tasks: Remove @neondatabase/serverless: npm uninstall @neondatabase/serverless
Install postgres driver: npm install postgres
Update src/db/index.ts to use postgres() instead of neon()
Run: npx drizzle-kit push
Verify all tables exist in Supabase Table Editor

steps.title: Enable RLS
tasks: In Supabase dashboard, enable RLS on: profiles, organizations, memberships, incidents, security_events
Apply the RLS policies from the rls_policies section of this document using SQL editor

steps.title: Wire Supabase Auth
tasks: npm install @supabase/supabase-js @supabase/ssr
Create src/lib/supabase/client.ts (createBrowserClient)
Create src/lib/supabase/server.ts (createServerClient with cookies())
Rewrite src/features/auth/context.tsx to use supabase.auth.*
Add trigger in Supabase: on auth.users insert → insert into public.profiles
Test sign-up creates profile row, sign-in returns session

steps.title: Replace incidents mock with server actions
tasks: Create src/actions/incidents.ts with: getIncidents(), createIncident(), updateIncident(), setIncidentStatus()
Each action uses the Drizzle db client + checks auth session server-side
Replace useIncidents() context calls in pages with direct server action calls or a client hook wrapping them
Delete src/lib/mock/data.ts and src/features/incidents/context.tsx once all pages are migrated

steps.title: Wire Supabase Storage for photos
tasks: Create bucket 'incident-photos' in Supabase Storage (private)
Set storage RLS: authenticated users can upload to their org folder
Update mobile report page: replace base64 preview storage with supabase.storage.from('incident-photos').upload()
Store returned public URL in incident.photo_url

steps.title: Organization onboarding flow
tasks: After sign-up, if user has no membership → redirect to /[locale]/onboarding
Create onboarding page: enter org name → creates organization row + membership row with role='owner'
Update RouteGuard to handle 'no org' state (redirect to onboarding instead of dashboard)

steps.title: Seed real data + final QA
tasks: Insert test org, test users, test incidents via Supabase dashboard
Test both instances end-to-end (admin flow + mobile flow)
Verify RLS blocks cross-org data access
Run npm run build — must be clean

steps.title: Vercel deploy
tasks: Push repo to GitHub (private)
Connect to Vercel
Add all env variables in Vercel project settings
Deploy and smoke test production URL

known_issues_and_notes: src/lib/utils/index.ts is an orphan — the real utils file is src/lib/utils.ts. The index.ts can be deleted.
shadcn uses @base-ui/react NOT @radix-ui — no asChild prop anywhere. Use className on trigger elements directly.
next-intl v4 uses requestLocale (not locale) in getRequestConfig. Already correctly implemented.
drizzle.config.ts uses dialect: 'postgresql' (not driver: 'pg') for drizzle-kit v0.31+. Already correct.
The proxy.ts file replaces the deprecated middleware.ts for next-intl routing.
Route group (app) and (mobile) both wrap with RouteGuard — this is the only auth enforcement on the client. Server-side enforcement will come from RLS + server actions in the refactor.
framer-motion v12 requires 'use client' on all components that use motion.* — all animation components already have this.
